title: ollama/ollama
summary: Ollama’s official CLI and server for downloading, running, and chatting with GGUF models locally (macOS/Linux/Windows).

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for the Ollama API (sync & async).

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain adapter to use Ollama models as LLMs, embedders, or tool callers.

title: ollama-webui (open-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama with chat history, RAG, user management and plugin store.

title: litellm + ollama
summary: LiteLLM proxy lets you call Ollama models through an OpenAI-compatible gateway with unified auth, logging, and load-balancing.

title: ollama-cli (node)
summary: Community-enhanced interactive CLI with syntax highlighting and conversation persistence.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like server using Ollama for code completion inside VS Code.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation template using Chroma + Ollama embeddings.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-host Discord bot that chats and generates images via Ollama endpoints.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama server on Kubernetes with GPU node selector and PVC support.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official multi-arch Docker images (CPU & CUDA) for running Ollama in containers.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client library for Ollama (Spring, Android compatible).

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with chat, embeddings, and tool-calling support.

title: ollama-github-action
summary: GitHub Action to spin up Ollama service in CI pipelines for testing code against local LLMs.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that brings Ollama chat into channels with thread support and model switching.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for AI-assisted writing using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-macos-menu-bar
summary: Native macOS menu-bar app to start/stop Ollama server and chat in a popover window.
